description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic, low-slung design with a matte black finish and angular bodywork. The front wheel is partially enclosed by a sculpted fender, while the rear is supported by two wide, robust tires, giving it a unique dual-wheel rear configuration. The seat is streamlined and positioned low, with a minimalistic handlebar setup and a compact dashboard. Red accents highlight key areas such as the wheel hubs, rear fender, and side panels, adding a striking contrast to the predominantly black body. The frame appears to be constructed from metal, with visible suspension components and a chain drive system. The overall aesthetic suggests a high-performance, concept-style motorcycle suitable for urban environments.
description: A futuristic, matte black motorcycle with dual rear wheels, angular bodywork, and red accent details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the dual wide rear tires, compact tail section, and red accents on the fenders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular front fender, low seat, and exposed frame structure.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the enclosed front wheel, narrow profile, and aggressive body lines.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible red accents and the unique rear wheel configuration.
